notes: Inspected pdf2clean.py Marker markdown table extraction and Stage1 tests. Current extractor had pending_caption from lines matching Table/Tab. before markdown table and raw/normalized whitespace fields, but lacked explicit caption_binding_rule, continuation metadata, noise class, and symbol normalization provenance.

Caption/table identity binding implemented generically for synthetic/source-observable caption lines: nearest preceding Table/Tab caption line emits caption_binding_rule=nearest_preceding_table_caption_line on table and cell records; also handles HTML/span-prefixed caption lines. L3H2RS2H smoke still had caption_bound=0 because Marker rendered-table stream did not expose captions to the table extractor for consumed tables; next repair should bind table records from structural block adjacency, not only raw line scanning.

Continuation/multi-panel stitching metadata implemented conservatively: adjacent Marker markdown table fragments with identical header signatures and no new caption retain separate table IDs but share continuation_group_id; second fragment rule=adjacent_compatible_marker_markdown_table.

Noise table tagging implemented conservatively for source-observable article metadata/chrome cues: confirmed_noise/article_metadata_table when multiple article metadata cues appear and scientific formulation cues are absent; ambiguous/scientific tables stay keep.

Symbol normalization/provenance implemented for Marker table cells: raw_cell_text preserved; normalized_cell_text handles ± -> +/-, μ/µ -> u, − -> -, ζ -> zeta; warnings_json records transformation provenance.
